summary: Iteration 21: Frontend-only testing of Discovery page UI redesign. All 9 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Discovery tab loads with 3-column layout on desktop (found 9 lg:grid-cols-3 elements)
Yes/No questions use checkboxes (not toggle switches) - found 26 checkbox elements with data-testid='checkbox-*'
Text-only questions show full question text without input field
Text-only question rows are fully clickable to expand note (isClickableRow = !hasInput)
Expanded note shows single textarea field with placeholder 'Enter your response...'
Select dropdowns work for platform/vendor selection (found 7 multiselect triggers)
Multi-select dropdown has checkboxes inside (Checkbox component for each option)
Multi-select dropdown has Done button to close (onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)})
Multi-select dropdown stays open for multiple selections (onInteractOutside prevents auto-close)
Section headers have checkbox for On/Off (Checkbox component with 'On'/'Off' text)
Visible borders/separators between question rows (border-b border-border/60 class)
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentQuestions.jsx correctly implements all 9 requested features
Yes/No questions use Checkbox component in compact mode (lines 281-287)
Text-only questions have isClickableRow=true and entire row onClick handler (lines 424-432)
Single note field using Textarea with appropriate placeholder (lines 466-478)
MultiSelectField uses Checkbox for each option (line 142) with Done button (line 178)
Section headers use Checkbox with On/Off text (line 507)
Visible separators use border-b border-border/60 class (line 431)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discovery page UI redesign verified: 1) 3-column layout using lg:grid-cols-3. 2) Yes/No questions use Checkbox component (not Switch). 3) Text-only questions are fully clickable rows that expand to show single Textarea for notes. 4) Multi-select dropdown uses Checkbox for each option with Done button. 5) Section headers use Checkbox with On/Off text. 6) Visible borders using border-b border-border/60.

3_column_layout.implementation: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 in compact mode

checkboxes_for_yesno.implementation: Checkbox component used in compact mode for yesno fieldType

text_only_questions_full_text.implementation: Questions without input fields show full text in span element

text_only_rows_clickable.implementation: isClickableRow = !hasInput, entire row has onClick handler

single_note_field.implementation: Single Textarea for notes, no separate answer field

multiselect_checkboxes_and_done.implementation: Checkbox for each option, Done button to close

visible_borders_separators.implementation: border-b border-border/60 class on question rows
